AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAUNTED.title: Haunted
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-HAUNTED.description: At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold], play it.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.title: Bury
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURY.description: This card goes to the [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] when played.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURIED.title: Buried
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BURIED.description: This card can be [gold]Disinterred[/gold] back into your hand.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-UNFORTUNATE.title: Unfortunate
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-UNFORTUNATE.description: Deals additional damage based on the enemy's [gold]Misfortune[/gold].
